text.title: Team Methodology Overlay Mechanism Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Engineers edit faion-base directly; their changes lost on next pull.
antipattern.fix: Block direct edits to faion-base via pre-commit hook.

antipattern.symptom: Overlay quietly replaces base; reviewer reads wrong rules in incident.
antipattern.fix: Validator requires conflict log entry on shadow.

antipattern.symptom: Overlay output shape diverges from base; tooling breaks.
antipattern.fix: CI runs schema-compat check across base + overlay.
